Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The laboratory results show good kidney and electrolyte function, and a favorable lipid profile. However, the HbA1c is elevated (6.4%), indicating impaired glucose metabolism consistent with prediabetes or early diabetes. Glucose is currently normal. Recommend clinical follow-up for glycemic control and diabetes risk management.
